description: Wall Street Journal API - premium financial news and analysis

articles.headline: Tech Giants Face Antitrust Scrutiny as AI Race Intensifies
articles.author: Emily Glazer
articles.summary: Federal regulators are examining whether major tech companies are using their dominance in cloud computing to gain unfair advantages in artificial intelligence.

articles.headline: Private Equity Firms Amass Record Cash for Buyouts
articles.author: Miriam Gottfried
articles.summary: Buyout firms have raised over $400 billion in dry powder, signaling a potential wave of leveraged acquisitions as interest rates stabilize.

articles.headline: Oil Majors Pivot Back to Fossil Fuels Amid Green Energy Struggles
articles.author: Collin Eaton
articles.summary: Shell and BP are scaling back renewable energy investments after disappointing returns, refocusing on core oil and gas operations.

articles.headline: Commercial Real Estate Defaults Hit 15-Year High
articles.author: Konrad Putzier
articles.summary: Office building loan defaults continue to surge as remote work trends persist, putting pressure on regional banks with heavy CRE exposure.
